PilotPage.title: OpenCouncil is running a pilot with some of the latest city council meetings of the Municipality of Athens.
PilotPage.subtitle: The information contained may have errors.

Footer.tagline: Built with respect and appreciation for local government.
Footer.companyDescriptionSuffix: , a non-profit company developing technology to strengthen democracy.
Footer.disclaimer: The information shown is automatically collected and may not be accurate.

Landing.stayInformedDescription: Receive updates about the topics and locations that interest you, before or after they are discussed in the city council.

MunicipalitySelector.noResults: No municipality found with that name.

CityForm.cityNameDescription: Enter the name of the city.
CityForm.timezoneDescription: Choose the time zone of the city.
CityForm.cityIdDescription: The ID will be used in the city's URL.
CityForm.logoImageDescription: The image you choose will be used as the city's logo.
CityForm.cityNameEnDescription: Enter the name of the city in English.
CityForm.cityMunicipalityDescription: Enter the name of the municipality.
CityForm.cityMunicipalityEnDescription: Enter the name of the municipality in English.
CityForm.officialSupportDescription: Cities with official support are prioritized in listings and appear on the landing page with meeting data. They also display a special badge.
CityForm.statusDescription: Pending cities route to petition page and are excluded from public listings. Unlisted cities are only visible to administrators. Listed cities are publicly visible.
CityForm.peopleOrderingDescription: Choose how people are ordered on the people page. Party Ranking orders by party power and custom party rankings.
CityForm.highlightCreationPermissionDescription: Control who can create highlights for this city
CityForm.supportsNotificationsDescription: Enable email and SMS notifications for meetings in this city
CityForm.consultationsEnabledDescription: Enable the public consultations tab for this city

CityMessageForm.noMessageSet: No message currently set for this city.
CityMessageForm.title: Title
CityMessageForm.inactiveDescription: Inactive messages are only visible to superadmins for preview purposes.

City.councilMeetingsTracked: {count, plural, =0 {No council meetings on OpenCouncil} =1 {1 council meeting on OpenCouncil} other {# council meetings on OpenCouncil}}
City.noItems: There are no cities in OpenCouncil.

AddMeetingForm.meetingNameDescription: Provide a name for the council meeting.
AddMeetingForm.meetingDateDescription: Select the date when the meeting took place.
AddMeetingForm.meetingTimeDescription: Select the time when the meeting took place.
AddMeetingForm.meetingVideoDescription: Choose the video recording for this meeting.
AddMeetingForm.meetingIdDescription: The ID will be used in the meeting's URL.
AddMeetingForm.meetingNameEnPlaceholder: Enter the meeting name in English
AddMeetingForm.meetingNameEnDescription: Provide the meeting name in English.
AddMeetingForm.administrativeBodyDescription: Select the administrative body for this meeting.
AddMeetingForm.meetingAgendaDescription: Provide a URL or upload a file with the meeting agenda.

NotFoundPage.title: Page Not Found
NotFoundPage.description: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
NotFoundPage.suggestion: Please check the URL or return to the home page.
NotFoundPage.helpDescription: If you believe this is an error, you can contact us.

hero.title: Bringing citizens closer to local government
hero.subtitle: OpenCouncil makes city council work visible and accessible to everyone

speakerRecognition.title: Speaker Recognition
speakerRecognition.description: Accurate recognition and attribution of speakers in council meetings.

accurateTranscriptions.title: Accurate Transcriptions
accurateTranscriptions.description: Generate accurate, word-for-word transcriptions of all council proceedings.

summarization.title: Summarization
summarization.description: Automatic generation of concise summaries of council meetings.

aiChatAssistant.title: AI Chat Assistant
aiChatAssistant.description: Ask questions about council meetings and get answers from the AI chat assistant.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.description: Watch the most important parts of each meeting, with highlights generated by AI or manually.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Transparent development, continuous improvement. Flexible license that allows commercial use.

openData.title: Open Data
openData.description: All data we produce is public and available through an open API without authentication.

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.description: Support for multiple languages to serve multicultural cities. All meetings are transcribed in English and Greek.

immediateIntegration.title: Immediate Integration
immediateIntegration.description: Connect OpenCouncil to your municipality in hours, not months.

enhancedAccessibility.title: Enhanced Accessibility
enhancedAccessibility.description: Make city council meetings understandable and accessible to all citizens, including people with disabilities. Our platform ensures that local democracy is inclusive, transparent, and approachable for every member of the community.

empowerCouncilMembers.title: Empower Council Members
empowerCouncilMembers.description: Equip your council members with powerful tools to streamline their work. Advanced search and organization features allow quick access to previous discussions, decisions, and important information, enhancing productivity and informed decision-making.

buildValuableAsset.title: Build Valuable Asset
buildValuableAsset.description: Create a rich, searchable database of council proceedings. This open data asset not only promotes transparency but also provides invaluable insights for policy-making, research, and citizen engagement, positioning your city at the forefront of smart governance.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.description: We believe in transparent pricing, especially when serving the public sector.

paid.title: 7,800€ per year
paid.subtitle: (Or one ten-thousandth of the municipality's budget, whichever is less)

features.unlimitedMeetings: Unlimited city council meetings per year
features.aiChatCredits: 100€ in AI chat credits per month

about.title: About OpenCouncil
about.description: OpenCouncil is a project created in Greece, built with care and respect for local government.

editMode.label: Edit Mode
editMode.description: Enable edit mode for transcript text

highlightUncertain.label: Highlight Uncertain Words
highlightUncertain.description: Highlight words with low recognition confidence

maxUtteranceDrift.label: Maximum Utterance Drift
maxUtteranceDrift.description: Maximum allowed time drift for each utterance in seconds
